title: Module Contract
description: Defines the public API, dependencies, and file boundaries of a SAMVIL project module. Stored at .samvil/modules/<name>/contract.json.

module_name.description: Machine-readable module identifier. Lowercase, starts with letter, dashes/underscores allowed.

version.description: Semantic version of this module contract.

description.description: Human-readable one-line description of what this module does.

file_patterns.description: Glob patterns matching files owned by this module. Used for boundary enforcement. Example: ['src/auth/**', 'lib/auth/**']

public_api.description: Functions, components, types, or endpoints this module exposes to other modules.

depends_on.description: Module names this module depends on. Circular dependencies are invalid.

owners.description: Owner identifiers (person or team). For solo developers, typically ['default'].

breaking_changes.description: History of breaking changes for this module.

type.description: What kind of API surface this is.

exported_from.description: File path where this API is exported (e.g., 'src/auth/index.ts').

description.description: One-line description of what this API does.

version.description: Module version where this breaking change was introduced.

affected_apis.description: API names affected by this change.
